name: codeclone
description: Baseline-aware structural review for Claude Desktop through a local CodeClone MCP launcher.
long_description: CodeClone for Claude Desktop is a small local MCP bundle wrapper around codeclone-mcp. It keeps Claude on the same canonical CodeClone MCP surface used by the CLI, HTML report, and VS Code extension while preserving a read-only, baseline-aware workflow. The bundle runs locally, forces stdio transport, and lets users configure an explicit launcher path when codeclone-mcp is not on PATH.

tools.name: analyze_repository
tools.description: Run a baseline-aware CodeClone analysis for the current repository.

tools.name: analyze_changed_paths
tools.description: Run changed-files analysis for PR-style structural review.

tools.name: get_production_triage
tools.description: Return the cheapest production-first hotspot and health snapshot.

tools.name: get_finding
tools.description: Open one canonical finding by id.

tools.name: get_remediation
tools.description: Return remediation guidance for one canonical finding.

launcher_command.title: CodeClone launcher command
launcher_command.description: Optional absolute path or bare command name for codeclone-mcp. Leave empty to use auto-discovery and PATH.

launcher_args_json.title: Advanced launcher args (JSON array)
launcher_args_json.description: Optional JSON array of additional codeclone-mcp arguments. Keep transport unset; this bundle always uses stdio.
